---
title: "Presenting my PhD proposal"
description: "After almost a year in my doctoral program, I presented my plan to collegueas from GW4+ and the geography department."
subtitle: "Upgrade"
date: "1935-05-15"
categories: [presentation]
image: "IMG-20250624-WA0015(1).jpg"
google-scholar: true
---

<!-- <!--Include academic icons or bottons-->

<!-- {{< include /files/includes/_academic.qmd >}} -->

As part of the doctoral program, a report is presented after 10 months to show progress and structured plan for the whole PhD project. I presented my ideas to experienced and knowledgeable examiners as well as to collegueas from the Gw4+ program at the thematic meeting Environmental solutions at the National History Museum (NHM) in London and the Geography department at Univeristy of Exeter along with other colleagues.

![Presentation at the NHM in London](IMG-20250624-WA0015(1).jpg){fig-align="center"}

![Upgrade presentation at Physics Building, UoE](IMG-20250702-WA0005(1).jpg){fig-align="center"}

\`\`\`
